question.text: Under SEBI PIT Regulations 2015, for transactions NOT requiring an open offer, UPSI may be communicated to the counterparty provided the UPSI is disseminated at least _____ prior to the transaction.

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under PIT Regulations, for transactions not involving an open offer, UPSI may be communicated to the counterparty provided the UPSI is disseminated to the public at least 2 trading days prior to the proposed transaction. **The Trap:** Candidates often confuse the 2-trading-day UPSI dissemination requirement with the 2-working-day reporting requirement for inter-se transfers. Both use "2 days" but in different contexts. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series IX tests the nuances of UPSI communication rules as they directly impact merchant banking deal structuring. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The 2-trading-day buffer ensures the market has time to absorb the information before the transaction — this prevents insiders from front-running their own deals.
